policyname: Brand profiles are viewable by client members
Users can access their client brands
using_expression:
(client_id IN ( SELECT client_members.client_id
   FROM client_members
  WHERE (client_members.user_id = auth.uid())))

((brand_id IN ( SELECT brand_profiles.id
   FROM brand_profiles
  WHERE (brand_profiles.client_id = client_id()))) OR (auth.role() = 'service_role'::text))

policyname: Members can insert own client members
with_check:
((client_id = client_id()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM client_members cm
  WHERE ((cm.client_id = client_members.client_id) AND (cm.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (cm.role = ANY (ARRAY['owner'::text, 'admin'::text]))))))

policyname: Members can update own client members
using_expression:
((client_id = client_id()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM client_members cm
  WHERE ((cm.client_id = client_members.client_id) AND (cm.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (cm.role = ANY (ARRAY['owner'::text, 'admin'::text]))))))
